title: Sepd_DonutWarp
description: A Warp Plugin Like Donut Smp Fully Optimized
body:
🧭 Sepd_DonutWarp – Lightweight Warp Plugin with Countdown & Permissions!

Sepd_DonutWarp is a clean, modern warp system built for servers that want performance, customization, and an intuitive teleport experience. Whether you're running survival, creative, or minigames — Sepd\_Warp makes navigation smooth and secure.

---

✨ Features:

* Create unlimited warps with simple commands
* Teleport with a smooth countdown and movement cancellation
* Permission-based access to each warp (`warp.use.<warp>`)
* Fully configurable messages in chat or action bar
* `/warps` list adapts to player permissions
* Supports reloading all configs without restarting
* Zero dependencies, fast YAML storage – plug and play!

---

🧭 Commands:

* `/setwarp <name>` – Set a warp at your current location
* `/warp <name>` – Teleport to a warp with countdown
* `/delwarp <name>` – Delete an existing warp
* `/warps` – List accessible warps
* `/warpreload` – Reload config and warp data on the fly

---

🔐 Permissions:

* `warp.set` – Set warps
* `warp.del` – Delete warps
* `warp.use` – Base permission to teleport
* `warp.use.<warp>` – Access specific warps
* `warp.use.*` – Access all warps
* `warp.list` – Use `/warps`
* `warp.reload` – Use `/warpreload`

---

📦 Simple, efficient, and ready for your server.**
Perfect for PvP arenas, spawn hubs, survival homes, creative zones, and more!

---

💬 Support – [Join Discord](https://discord.com/invite/9njKeJzWF4)

Need help or want to suggest a feature? Join the community and reach out anytime!
